title: Friendly Fire
description: Stops you from accidentally damaging your pets or friendly mobs during fights.
body:
# 🛡️ **FriendlyFireBetter**

**FriendlyFireBetter** is a lightweight **client-side Fabric mod** that prevents you from accidentally attacking your own pets or friends.

Perfect for **Survival**, **SMPs**, and **PvP servers**, this mod modifies **client-side combat behavior** to block melee attacks against friendly targets and provides clear feedback with a no-damage hit sound—similar to hitting a creative-mode player.

---

## ✨ **Features**

- 🐺 **Protect Tamed Pets**  
  Prevents melee damage to your own wolves, cats, and other tamed mobs.

- 🤝 **Friend System**  
  Block melee attacks on players you add to your friend list.

- 🔊 **Hit Feedback**  
  Plays the no-damage hit sound when an attack is blocked.

- ⌨️ **Quick Add Keybind**  
  Aim at a player and press **G** to instantly add them as a friend.

- 🧩 **Client-Side Only**  
  No server installation required. Safe to use on any server.

---

## 💬 **Commands**

- /friend add <player> - Add a player to your friend list
- /friend remove <player> - Remove a player from your friend list
- /friend list - View your current friends
- /friendlyfire petprotection on - Enable pet protection
- /friendlyfire petprotection off - Disable pet protection
- /friendlyfire petprotection status - Show pet protection status
